# scanning

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that determines whether the central manager is scanning for peripherals.

## Declaration

```swift
var scanning: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Set this property to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/swift/true] to start scanning for peripherals. Upon discovering a peripheral, the central manager calls the delegate’s [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/playgroundbluetooth/playgroundbluetoothcentralmanagerdelegate/3029478-centralmanager] method.

## Configuring Central Managers

- **init(services:queue:)**: Creates a central manager that supports communicating with Bluetooth peripherals.
- **delegate**: A delegate that can receive messages from the central manager by adopting the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/playgroundbluetooth/playgroundbluetoothcentralmanagerdelegate] protocol.
